# PERF-164 negative: db.QueryContext propagates cancellation
lang: go
file: PERF-164-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
)

func Handle(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) {
	rows, _ := db.QueryContext(r.Context(), "SELECT id FROM users")
	defer rows.Close()
	_ = rows
}
